programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Fridge Ingredients
programme.desc: Gary makes a shock announcement.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Grant King
programme.desc: Three of the hopefuls are challenged to cook crispy scaled snapper with calamari crackling.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Kylie Kwong
programme.desc: For the week's second elimination, the contestants must recreate a mouth-watering Kylie Kwong dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Team Challenge: Edible Centrepiece
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must produce a French-inspired dessert in just one hour.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Dish They've Missed the Most
programme.desc: The contestants are reunited with a family member and must cook a meal their loved ones have missed the most.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 11
programme.desc: The final 6 contestants have their last class with Gary and Matt before finals week.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Finals Week: Guillaume at Bennelong
programme.desc: The remaining 6 contestants must prepare a dish at Bennelong, a Sydney Opera House restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Finals Week: Perfect Sauce for a Perfect Stake
programme.desc: The second elimination challenge of finals week features MasterChef UK's John Torode as guest judge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Finals Week: Perfect Sauce for a Perfect Stake
programme.desc: The second elimination challenge of finals week features MasterChef UK's John Torode as guest judge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Finals Week: Signature Dishes
programme.desc: Each hopeful is paired with a culinary legend and has 90 minutes to produce a worthy signature dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - MasterChef 2012 Finale
programme.desc: Andy, Audra and Julia faced off in the Grand Finale, consisting of three challenges.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: From over 5,000 Applicants the top 50 Junior cooks gather for the first challenges of the Junior MasterChef Series.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: The remaining kids have their chance to cook their best dishes for a chance to make it through to the top 20.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: The top 20 learn that they will be cooking in an invention test with two core ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: The excited top 12 arrive at the MasterChef Kitchen for the first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: In their first offsite challenge, the kids are divided into teams to take over a High School tuck shop.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: 10 kids from our top 50 join us for the first Cook-along MasterClass in the MasterChef Kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: In week 2 the kids find out that they have 3 more chances to win points before the first elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: Today 4 kids will be going home and 8 will move onto the second stage in the Junior MasterChef competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: It’s MasterClass time and 12 lucky students join Gary, George and Anna.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP110
programme.desc: The scoreboard has been wiped clean and to earn points The top 8 faces a basic skills test.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: After a Toad in the Hole Masterclass from top chef John Torode, the four cooks try their hand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: After a Masterclass in Thai chicken cakes from top chef John Torode, the four cooks try their hand.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: Whose dessert will launch presenters John and Nadia in to sweet orbit?

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: After a scrummy Berry pudding Masterclass from top chef John Torode, the four cooks have a bash.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: With only two semi final places up for grabs, the competition gets serious.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP3
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Roach Coach
programme.desc: Four teams of two compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk underwater.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Broken Hearts & Blood Baths
programme.desc: Four teams of exes must deal with 3 stunts and each other.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Tall Crappacino
programme.desc: Four teams of two attempt to win $50,000.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (19 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (20 out of 39)

programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: Four aspiring chefs compete for a place in the quarter-final.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: After a scrummy Masterclass in scotch pancakes from top chef John Torode, it's the four cooks' turn.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: With a quarter final place to win, the competition heats up further as they make their tastiest food.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: With a quarter final place up for grabs, the competition reaches boiling point as they go all out to impress.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP10
programme.desc: In the second quarter-final, four heat winners compete to be the best cook in the country.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP11
programme.desc: The four remaining chefs must cook lunch for Doctor Who and his companion.

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP12
programme.desc: They must prepare lunch for pop band JLS. Will their food be a hit with the boys?

programme.title: MasterChef UK Junior Season 01 - EP13
programme.desc: The four best chefs battle it out to become crowned Junior Masterchef Champion 2010.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP2
programme.desc: At the MasterChef kitchen, the Top 24 contestants face a mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP3
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef house then face a fish challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP3
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef house then face a fish challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP4
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must replicate a gourmet egg dish created by award-winning Auckland chef Simon Wright.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP5
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face a mystery box challenge in which they must cook one savoury and one sweet dish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP6
programme.desc: The contestants must reinvent one of three classic dishes – macaroni cheese, roast lamb or trifle.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP7
programme.desc: The contestants face their first team challenge and first full service

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP8
programme.desc: The contestants tackle a ‘heads and tails’ challenge in which they must cook lesser-known cuts of meat.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP9
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants cook one savoury dish and one sweet dish for the MasterChef judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP10
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants cook with their ‘weapons of choice’ – a cream canister, smoking gun or blow torch.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP11
programme.desc: The The Top Eight contestants cook a three course dinner for 80 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP12
programme.desc: The contestants must each cook a dish using My Food Bag ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP13
programme.desc: There’s a big travel prize up for grabs as the Top Six contestants cook dishes featuring New Zealand clams.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP14
programme.desc: The Top Five contestants must replicate a complicated dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP15
programme.desc: At Al Maha resort in the Arabian desert, the Top Four contestants pair off to cook a seven-course feast.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP16
programme.desc: At Grosvenor House in Dubai, the contestants cook a three-course meal for 24 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP17
programme.desc: In the semi-final, the top three contestants cook their signature dishes for the judges.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP18
programme.desc: The two finalists face three epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Mystery Box & Adriano Zumba Elimination
programme.desc: The Top 50 contestants arrive on Cockatoo Island for the first day of MasterChef 2011.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Hee Haw! Hee Haw!
programme.desc: Four sets of twins compete for $50,000 as they are electric shocked.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Scorpion Tales
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition.
